chunks.text: Crl. Appeal No.S-87 of 2021 Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Appeal No.S-87 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case. 1. For orders on M.A.No.1513/2025 (Ex/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.1514/2025 (R/surety) 3. For hearing of M.A.No.2860/2025 (561-A Cr.PC) 21.08.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Buriro, Advocate for the appellants. Mr. Ghulam Hussain Shah, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General. **************** This Court vide order dated 28.10.2024 accorded permission to the parties to compromise and accepted the same, subject to deposit the share of diyat amount of minor legal heirs including Ishfaque (son) and Moomal (daughter) with the Accountant of this Court within 30 days. In case of the failure, the appellants shall have to serve for indefinite term of simple imprisonment till payment of share of diyat amount of the minor legal heirs. Record reflect, the appellants failed to deposit the same within stipulated period. Accordingly, NBWs were issued against them with notice to their surety, as they were allowed to remain on bail till depositing the diyat amount within stipulated period, whereby they were arrested and remanded to Central Prison-I, Sukkur. The learned counsel for the applicant has placed on record copy of registered sale deed bearing Sr.No.3589, dated 22.10.2024, whereby an agricultural land measuring (01-00) acre, out of Survey No.352 (08- 11) acres is registered in the name of minor legal heirs referred herein above in lieu of diyat amount of Rs.23,63,653.54. Such information is Crl. Appeal No.S-87 of 2021 Page 2 of 2 duly furnished by Sub-Registrar (H Q Khairpur).

Such information is Crl. Appeal No.S-87 of 2021 Page 2 of 2 duly furnished by Sub-Registrar (H Q Khairpur). The record of rights is also mutated in the names of minors vide entry No.257, dated 09.05.2025. In this respect, Mst. Firdous, the mother/wali of the minors appeared and submitted that the possession of the property has also been received by her on behalf of minors. Given above, I am satisfied that diyat amount in shape of landed property has been paid to the minor legal heirs. Therefore, there is no impediment to allow the instant application for satisfaction of order dated 28.10.2024. Accordingly, listed C.M.A (2861/2025) is hereby allowed. Consequently, appellants confined in Central Prison-I, Sukkur for want of payment of diyat amount are ordered to be released forthwith, if not required in other custody case. Office is directed to place on record signed copy of this order in captioned connection Crl. Misc. Application. J U D G E
